{{Infobox construct
| name = Golems
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Golems]] are animated creatures of rock and metal with gems embedded in their heads that patrol the [[Damascan]] tents.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c17">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Golems]] are used to add bricks to walls.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] is standing behind a wall of golems and [[Travelers]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
